title: matelea oaxacana
intro: Matelea oaxacana, also known as the "Vine of the Dead" due to its toxic properties, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant contains various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, pain, and inflammation. The health benefits associated with Matelea oaxacana include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Matelea oaxacana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although caution should be exercised when using this plant due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
